rule: Limit draw calls below 200 per frame
implementation: Merge geometries with BufferGeometryUtils; use instancing
Replace individual meshes with THREE.InstancedMesh when count > 10

rule: Dispose geometry and materials on unmount
implementation: Call geometry.dispose() + material.dispose() + texture.dispose() in cleanup
Use LOD; simplify meshes; use impostors for distant objects
Use gltf-transform; ktx2 reduces GPU mem 4-8x

rule: Use texture atlases to reduce draw calls
implementation: Pack multiple textures into one atlas; adjust UV coordinates
texture.minFilter = LinearMipmapLinearFilter; generateMipmaps = true
Dynamically import Three.js; load models after hero text renders

rule: Use DRACO compression for GLTF models
implementation: Run gltf-transform draco on all .glb files; 70-90% size reduction
Use THREE.LOD; swap to lower-poly mesh at distance thresholds
Pre-allocate Vector3/Matrix4 outside animation loop; reuse them
Only render when needed; use setAnimationLoop(null) when paused
Use lowp or mediump precision in shaders; avoid highp where not needed
renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio 2))
Ensure mesh.frustumCulled = true; custom bounding boxes for large meshes
Start at 512x512; only increase to 1024 if needed; limit shadow casters

rule: Use baked lighting instead of real-time
implementation: Bake AO + shadows into textures in Blender; remove dynamic lights
Each light adds cost to every lit shader; bake where possible
Batch uniform updates; avoid setting uniforms inside render loop if unchanged
Background elements; UI planes; particles don't need lighting calc
Object pool for Points/Sprites; reset instead of create+destroy
Use WebM/Opus at 96kbps for ambient; 128kbps for music

rule: Use Web Workers for heavy computation
implementation: Offload physics; pathfinding; geometry generation via comlink
Show low-poly placeholder; stream full model via useGLTF or fetch

rule: Avoid layout thrashing in animation loop
implementation: Never read offsetWidth/clientHeight in rAF loop; cache DOM measurements
renderer.autoClear = false; manually clear only what changed
Each RenderTarget uses VRAM; chain passes on single target; dispose unused
Each mesh onBeforeRender fires per frame; consolidate into scene-level update

rule: Preload critical assets with link rel preload
implementation: Add link rel=preload for hero .glb and hero textures in HTML head

rule: Profile with Spector.js and Chrome GPU tab
implementation: Use Spector.js for draw call inspection; Chrome GPU tab for memory
